title: nabalus trifoliolatus var. nanus
intro: Nabalus trifoliolatus var. nanus, also known as the dwarf American ironweed, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the southeastern United States. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its leaves and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Nabalus trifoliolatus var. nanus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its roots can be used to make a salve or ointment for topical application.
